name: create_repo_readme
description: Evals for the create_repo_readme skill — verify it triggers on product repo README work and skips on stack repo or sub-folder docs.

evals.name: triggers_on_creating_new_product_repo
evals.input: Create the acme/admin repo, it'll be the admin panel for the product.
evals.reason: New Cat C product repo — needs README + `wsp scaffold-repo --category C`.

evals.name: triggers_on_audit_request
evals.input: Audit the README of widget/api, I'm not sure it follows the convention.

evals.name: triggers_on_empty_readme_observation
evals.input: I just noticed acme/orchestrator has no README. What do we do?
evals.reason: Missing README on a Cat C repo — exact use case for this skill.

evals.name: skips_on_stack_repo_readme
evals.input: Update the README of <org>/agent-stack-core to mention the new skill.
evals.reason: Stack repo, not product repo. Out of scope per § 1; use plain edit or wsp scaffold-stack.

evals.name: skips_on_subfolder_doc
evals.input: Document the orchestrator/api/v2/ folder with a README explaining the endpoints.
evals.reason: Sub-folder README inside a product repo — left to the team's discretion, not covered.

evals.name: skips_on_unrelated_readme
evals.input: Write a README for a standalone script I have in /tmp/.
evals.reason: Not a governed product repo, no category.
